features.rothText: E Roth contributions — Participants may elect to defer up to 100% of their compensation.
features.afterTaxText: E After-tax contributions — Participants may elect to make voluntary contributions on an after-tax basis up to 10% of compensation.
features.loansText: (8) Michelin 401(k) For the years ended Notes receivable from participants A participant may borrow from his or her account under the Plan as long as the eligibility requirements are met.
